author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Pterodactyl was a genus of pterosaurs (flying reptiles) that lived during the Late Jurassic epoch.
Unlike birds, the wings of Pterodactyl were formed by a skin and muscle membrane stretching from its elongated fourth finger to its hind limbs.
